tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_package_json_uses_alchemyst_sdk
tests.trace:
@pytest.fixture(scope="session")
    def built_project():
        """Ensure the CLI is built and dist/main.js exists before running tests."""
        assert os.path.isdir(PROJECT_DIR), (
            f"Expected project directory {PROJECT_DIR} to exist before verification."
        )
        if not os.path.isfile(DIST_ENTRY):
            # Try to (re)build the project from sources.
            if not os.path.isdir(os.path.join(PROJECT_DIR, "node_modules")):
                install = subprocess.run(
                    ["npm", "install"],
                    cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
                    capture_output=True,
                    text=True,
                    timeout=600,
                )
                assert install.returncode == 0, (
                    f"'npm install' failed in {PROJECT_DIR}:\n"
                    f"stdout: {install.stdout}\nstderr: {install.stderr}"
                )
            build = subprocess.run(
                ["npm", "run", "build"],
                cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=600,
            )
>           assert build.returncode == 0, (
                f"'npm run build' failed in {PROJECT_DIR}:\n"
                f"stdout: {build.stdout}\nstderr: {build.stderr}"
            )
E           AssertionError: 'npm run build' failed in /home/user/myproject:
E             stdout: 
E             > shared-team-memory-cli@1.0.0 build
E             > tsc
E             
E             src/main.ts(73,29): error TS2339: Property 'memory' does not exist on type 'Context'.
E             src/main.ts(82,42): error TS2339: Property 'memory' does not exist on type 'Context'.
E             
E             stderr: 
E           assert 2 == 0
E            +  where 2 = CompletedProcess(args=['npm', 'run', 'build'], returncode=2, stdout="\n> shared-team-memory-cli@1.0.0 build\n> tsc\n\n...n type 'Context'.\nsrc/main.ts(82,42): error TS2339: Property 'memory' does not exist on type 'Context'.\n", stderr='').returncode
